name: xAI Grok API MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for xAI's Grok models — the frontier LLMs from Elon Musk's AI company. Grok models offer real-time knowledge (via X/Twitter data), long context windows, and competitive frontier model capabilities. OpenAI-compatible API enables easy integration. Enables AI agents to call Grok-1.5, Grok-2, and future Grok models.
use_cases: Calling Grok models for frontier-class reasoning from agent orchestration workflows
Leveraging Grok's real-time knowledge for current events analysis from news agents
Using Grok's vision capabilities for image analysis from multimodal agents
Building X/Twitter-integrated agents that leverage Grok's native X.com data access
not_for: Regulated enterprise use cases requiring SOC2/HIPAA (xAI compliance posture is less mature)
Non-X/Twitter social data use cases where other providers may be better
best_when: An agent developer wants access to frontier-class LLMs with real-time knowledge, or wants the OpenAI-compatible alternative from xAI with X/Twitter data integration.
avoid_when: You need enterprise compliance guarantees (SOC2, HIPAA). FINANCIAL RISK: Frontier model API costs accumulate quickly in agent chains.

auth.notes: xAI API key authentication. OpenAI-compatible format. Keys generated via xAI API console.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with limited credits via X Premium subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per token pricing; Grok-2 ~$2/1M input tokens, $10/1M output tokens
pricing.notes: API access through xAI console. X Premium subscribers get some free Grok API access. Competitive pricing with major providers.

performance.rate_limits: xAI API rate limits documented in API console

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Frontier model costs accumulate quickly in agent chains
xAI is newer company — compliance posture (SOC2, HIPAA) less mature than OpenAI/Google
Real-time knowledge is via X/Twitter data — may reflect X platform changes
Community MCP — official Grok SDK is minimal; verify current API
OpenAI-compatible API but verify tool calling / function calling compatibility
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Frontier model costs. Limited public compliance documentation. US data processing only. API key must be secured.

security_score_components.security_notes: Frontier AI provider. Limited compliance documentation. US only. API key security required. Newer provider — monitor security posture.
